query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pendingStockCount FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'STOCK' AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'pending' AND p.archivedAt IS NULL;
